CUSTOMCHARACTERKIRBY-NORMAL_ABILITY.desc: Inhale cards to gain Copy Abilities
CUSTOMCHARACTERKIRBY-NORMAL_ABILITY.smar: Inhale cards to gain Copy Abilities
CUSTOMCHARACTERKIRBY-SWORD_ABILITY.descr: Don a green hat with your sword in hand! Spin Slash! Do a Sword Dive as your finishing strike! It's all about the flourish
CUSTOMCHARACTERKIRBY-SWORD_ABILITY.smart: Don a green hat with your sword in hand! Spin Slash! Do a Sword Dive as your finishing strike! It's all about the flourish
CUSTOMCHARACTERKIRBY-SWORD_ABILITY.title: Sword
CUSTOMCHARACTERKIRBY-LEAF_ABILITY.descri: Time to dance! The Leaf Dance creates a gorgeous swirl of razor-sharp leaves. Guard, and... Huh?! You vanished!
CUSTOMCHARACTERKIRBY-LEAF_ABILITY.smartD: Time to dance! The Leaf Dance creates a gorgeous swirl of razor-sharp leaves. Guard, and... Huh?! You vanished!
CUSTOMCHARACTERKIRBY-LEAF_ABILITY.title: Leaf
CUSTOMCHARACTERKIRBY-MIRROR_ABILITY.desc: Reflect attacks back at your rivals, and make duplicates to confound foes!
CUSTOMCHARACTERKIRBY-MIRROR_ABILITY.smar: Reflect attacks back at your rivals, and make duplicates to confound foes!
CUSTOMCHARACTERKIRBY-ICE_ABILITY.descrip: Frozen foe? Give it a kick! Glide gracefully across the land with Ice-Skate, and even cool down those hot, hot flames!
CUSTOMCHARACTERKIRBY-ICE_ABILITY.smartDe: Frozen foe? Give it a kick! Glide gracefully across the land with Ice-Skate, and even cool down those hot, hot flames!
CUSTOMCHARACTERKIRBY-ICE_ABILITY.title: Ice
CUSTOMCHARACTERKIRBY-SLEEP_ABILITY.descr: Just...five more...minutes. Please...just let me sleep. If you must...wake me... just...shake me... Zzz...zzz...zzz...
CUSTOMCHARACTERKIRBY-SLEEP_ABILITY.smart: Just...five more...minutes. Please...just let me sleep. If you must...wake me... just...shake me... Zzz...zzz...zzz...
CUSTOMCHARACTERKIRBY-SLEEP_ABILITY.title: Sleep
CUSTOMCHARACTERKIRBY-NEEDLE_ABILITY.desc: Prick your foes with a thorny jab! Really stick it to 'em! Roll from dashing to bring the pain with a Rolling Needle!
CUSTOMCHARACTERKIRBY-NEEDLE_ABILITY.smar: Prick your foes with a thorny jab! Really stick it to 'em! Roll from dashing to bring the pain with a Rolling Needle!
CUSTOMCHARACTERKIRBY-BEAM_ABILITY.descri: Lash foes with a whip-like beam! Dash for Cycle! Grab and Capture! Spin in midair for a Revolution! Charge it up, and BAM! Wave Beam!
CUSTOMCHARACTERKIRBY-BEAM_ABILITY.smartD: Lash foes with a whip-like beam! Dash for Cycle! Grab and Capture! Spin in midair for a Revolution! Charge it up, and BAM! Wave Beam!
CUSTOMCHARACTERKIRBY-BEAM_ABILITY.title: Beam
CUSTOMCHARACTERKIRBY-PROJECTILE_STAR_POW: A star, spit it out to hurt foes or swallow them to gain strength.
A star, spit it out to hurt foes or swallow them to gain strength.
CUSTOMCHARACTERKIRBY-SKY_ENERGY_SWORD_PO: The next [gold]Overhead Slash[/gold] deals damage to ALL enemies.
The next Overhead Slash deals damage to ALL enemies
Your next [gold]Sword Dive[/gold] applies [gold]Stun[/gold] to the target.
Your next [gold]Sword Dive[/gold] applies [gold]Stun[/gold] to the target.
CUSTOMCHARACTERKIRBY-HOVER_POWER.descrip: Take 50% less damage from attacks, but skip your turn when it runs out.
CUSTOMCHARACTERKIRBY-HOVER_POWER.smartDe: Take 50% less damage from attacks, but skip your turn when it runs out.
CUSTOMCHARACTERKIRBY-HOVER_POWER.title: Hover
CUSTOMCHARACTERKIRBY-STUNNED_POWER.title: Stunned
CUSTOMCHARACTERKIRBY-LEAF_POWER.descript: A leaf, great for hiding or attacking your enemies
CUSTOMCHARACTERKIRBY-LEAF_POWER.smartDes: A leaf, great for hiding or attacking your enemies
CUSTOMCHARACTERKIRBY-LEAF_POWER.title: Leaf
CUSTOMCHARACTERKIRBY-SLEEP_POWER.descrip: Heal 5 HP per turn, but you can't play any cards.
CUSTOMCHARACTERKIRBY-SLEEP_POWER.smartDe: Heal 5 HP per turn, but you can't play any cards.
CUSTOMCHARACTERKIRBY-SLEEP_POWER.title: Asleep
CUSTOMCHARACTERKIRBY-CRACKLER_POWER.desc: Deals damage to a random enemy at the end of your turn.
CUSTOMCHARACTERKIRBY-CRACKLER_POWER.smar: Deals damage to a random enemy at the end of your turn.
CUSTOMCHARACTERKIRBY-DODGE_ROLL_POWER.de: Gain 1 energy for each fully blocked attack.
CUSTOMCHARACTERKIRBY-DODGE_ROLL_POWER.sm: Gain 1 energy for each fully blocked attack.
CUSTOMCHARACTERKIRBY-GALACTIC_NOVA_POWER: A random card in your hand is free to play each turn.
A random card in your hand is free to play each turn.
CUSTOMCHARACTERKIRBY-COPY.description: This card transforms when using a copy ability.
CUSTOMCHARACTERKIRBY-COPY.smartDescripti: This card transforms when using a copy ability.
CUSTOMCHARACTERKIRBY-COPY.title: Copy
